input:
What added to their bitterness was the fact that the terms of the agreement meant that they had to go back home without being able to fulfil their purpose of worshipping at the Kaʿbah. It should be remembered that the Prophet and his companions were in iḥrām, the state of consecration, having left Madinah in order to perform the ʿUmrah. They were first prevented from entering Makkah by the declared intention of the Quraysh to use force to stop them.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 28: Peace in the Making

output.scene_title: Prophet and Companions Forced to Leave Makkah
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 28: Peace in the Making

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a brown cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by brown cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Abu Bakr al-Siddiq
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Thin grey-streaked beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

characters.name: Umar ibn Al-Khattab
characters.appearance: Mid-40s, olive skin, athletic build, rugged features. Short dark beard, prominent nose, and sharp jawline. Wearing simple off-white thobe, brown woolen cloak, and plain white headscarf. Worn leather sandals, carrying a leather water skin. Strong confident stance.

output.moral_lesson: Patience and trust in Allah's plan is essential in difficult situations.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet and his companions were on their way to perform the ʿUmrah, but they were stopped by the Quraysh. They had to leave Makkah without being able to fulfill their purpose of worshipping at the Kaʿbah. This was a bitter pill to swallow.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by sunlight. Abu Bakr and Umar shown with full faces, concerned expressions. Warm emotional scene, appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of Makkah, a city wall in the background. A medium-sized crowd of rough-looking Arab men in simple white thobes and brown cloaks, some carrying leather water skins, seen in the distance, with the Prophet in a white thobe and brown cloak, white turban, entirely from behind, walking away from the city. In the foreground, a slender older Arab man in off-white thobe and brown cloak, with light olive skin, thin grey-streaked beard with henna tint, sitting on a rocky outcropping, looking up with a mix of sadness and resolve, one hand on his chest. Strong sunlight casting long shadows. Medium shot, eye level. Earthy color palette. No modern objects.
